query: heavy lens flare sun glare washout veil photograph haze
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: lens flare overload — sun glare, washout, hexagonal flare artifacts, veiled hazy aesthetic

response.objective_caption: A bright, star-shaped point of light with orange, yellow, and white tones sits near the center of the frame, emitting a narrow downward flare. Translucent circular halos overlap around the central glow, intersecting to form curved geometric patterns. The background shifts from deep black to muted green and amber gradients. Red, green, and blue edges trace the perimeters of the brightest light forms.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: An abstract photograph that abandons representational clarity, showing a radiant star-shaped burst and overlapping circular halos of light against a dark background. The image employs intentional blur and soft focus throughout, rendering the luminous forms diffuse and ethereal. Prominent chromatic aberration produces rainbow-colored fringing along the high-contrast edges of the circular rings and central glow, adding a lo-fi optical quality to the composition.
